## User-facing clarity

- [ ] A new visitor can understand the changed workflow from the README, demo docs, UI labels, or tests.
- [ ] This change avoids adding a button/control when grouping, renaming, or removing one would be clearer.
- [ ] Any "AI" wording clearly distinguishes local rules from real opt-in AI/API behavior.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run scan`
- [ ] Manual gallery check, if UI changed

## Privacy and Filesystem Impact

Describe whether this changes local file access, asset serving, metadata handling, generated indexes, network behavior, or screenshots.
